NWS STORM SURVEY CONFIRMS AN EF-0 TORNADO OCCURRED LAST EVENING IN THE TOWN OF ALEXANDER. TWO ROLLED TRAILERS, THREE STRUCTURES WITH ROOF DAMAGE, ONE STRUCTURE WITH BROKEN WINDOWS, AND MULTIPLE HARDWOOD TREES EITHER SNAPPED OR UPROOTED WERE FOUND ALONG A PATH THAT STARTED JUST NORTH OF THE ALEXANDER FIRE REC HALL AND CONTINUED ENE ENDING AT THE CEMETERY ON RAILROAD AVE. MAXIMUM WIND WAS ESTIMATED AT 85 MPH WITH AN APPROXIMATE TRACK LENGTH OF 0.75 MILES AND WIDTH OF 75 YARDS. PLEASE SEE BUFPNSBUF FOR MORE DETAILED INFORMATION.
